reason: The sole residual finding is a fabricated heading that accurately describes its content. The heading '複数トランザクション（接続名を明示指定）' does not exist in the source, but it correctly characterizes the XML block that follows — a configuration where both connectionName and transactionName are set to "subTran". No incorrect facts are introduced; the fabrication is purely structural. An AI agent reading this section will arrive at a correct understanding of the configuration.

findings_assessment.justification: The invented heading '複数トランザクション（接続名を明示指定）' accurately labels the content beneath it. The XML example it introduces genuinely shows the pattern of specifying an explicit connection name (connectionName=subTran / transactionName=subTran), so no misinformation reaches the agent. Phase E preserved the heading because removing it would reduce readability without correcting any factual error — the fabrication is a structural addition only, with zero semantic distortion.
